sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, description Nullable(String), created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Sample', NULL, '2023-01-01 00:00:00'), (2, 'Test', 'An example description', '2023-01-02 00:00:00'), (3, 'Edge Case', NULL, '2023-01-03 00:00:00');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE notILike(name, 'sample%') AND description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, notILike(name, 'sample%') AS name_check FROM test_table WHERE name_check AND created_at < '2023-01-02 00:00:00';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, notILike(name, 'sample%') AS name_check FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL) AS sub_query GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL WITH DATA;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN temp_table AS t2 ON notILike(t1.name, t2.name) WHERE t1.description IS NOT NULL AND t2.id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name, notILike(name, 'test%') IS NOT NULL AS pattern_check FROM test_table WHERE pattern_check AND created_at = (SELECT max(created_at) FROM test_table) LIMIT 1;

WITH (SELECT count() AS total FROM test_table WHERE notILike(name, 'edge case%')) AS total_counts SELECT total_counts.total, notILike(name, 'case%') AS neg_check FROM test_table HAVING neg_check IS NOT NULL;
